extract: Blush Mountain (Japanese: ホテリ山(やま) Mount Hoteri) is a location on Ula'ula Island in Alola, located on Route 12. The Geothermal Power Plant is located here. In Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, the area produces a special magnetic field that allows Magneton, Nosepass, and Charjabug to evolve when leveled up here.
